variant_name: 高令宁 — 前世暮年（回忆）
trigger: 前世回忆片段：丧子之后与沈词婚姻彻底破碎，在漫长的怨恨与消耗中走向暮年，最终以瓷片自伤颈部而亡，是重生前的最后形象

appearance_delta.face: 面容枯槁，颧骨高耸，眼窝深陷，杏眼不再明亮而是浑浊暗淡，法令纹与眼尾皱纹深刻，薄唇干裂无血色，神情是彻底的心如死灰
appearance_delta.body: 极度消瘦，骨架嶙峋，肩背佝偻，已无年轻时的挺拔体态
appearance_delta.hair: 花白稀疏，枯燥无光泽，随意挽成松散低髻，以一根旧银簪勉强固定
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 脖颈处有一道触目惊心的鲜红伤口（瓷片自伤），手中握着带血的碎瓷片

costume_override.outfit: 灰白色旧襦裙，布料洗得发薄，褙子颜色黯淡近乎无色，衣衫不整，腰间绦带松垮

visual_reference: An elderly emaciated Chinese woman in her late years, gaunt face with deep wrinkles and sunken hollow eyes that were once sharp almond-shaped but now clouded and lifeless, grey-white thinning hair in a loose low bun held by an old tarnished silver hairpin, wearing a faded grey-white worn hanfu ruqun with a dull outer beizi, hunched posture with protruding bones, holding a blood-stained broken porcelain shard in one trembling hand, a fresh red wound visible on the side of her neck, sitting alone in a dark desolate traditional Chinese room with cold lighting, desaturated color palette, somber atmosphere, cinematic lighting, highly detailed, 8k
visual_prompt_negative: young face, smooth skin, bright eyes, colorful clothing, smile, healthy complexion, jewelry, modern clothing, glasses, tattoo, Western features, fantasy armor, wings
emotional_tone: 绝望赴死——一生执念燃尽后的万念俱灰，是角色弧光的最低点，与重生后的新生形成最强烈对比
